test_cases.name: happy_path_standard_json_logs
test_cases.scenario: Analyze typical JSON-formatted error logs with stack traces to identify root causes, suggest fixes, and generate alerts.

input.error_logs:
[{"timestamp":"2024-01-15T10:30:00Z","severity":"ERROR","error_type":"NullPointerException","message":"Cannot read property 'user' of undefined","stack_trace":"at getUserProfile (user-service.js:45)
at processRequest (api-gateway.js:120)
at handleConnection (server.js:78)","service":"user-service","environment":"prod","version":"2.1.0"},{"timestamp":"2024-01-15T10:31:00Z","severity":"ERROR","error_type":"NullPointerException","message":"Cannot read property 'user' of undefined","stack_trace":"at getUserProfile (user-service.js:45)
at processRequest (api-gateway.js:120)
at handleConnection (server.js:78)","service":"user-service","environment":"prod","version":"2.1.0"},{"timestamp":"2024-01-15T10:32:00Z","severity":"ERROR","error_type":"TimeoutError","message":"Request timeout after 30000ms","stack_trace":"at timeout (database-client.js:89)
at query (database-client.js:156)
at fetchUserData (user-service.js:67)","service":"user-service","environment":"prod","version":"2.1.0"}]

test_cases.expected_behavior: Skill successfully parses JSON logs, clusters similar errors (NullPointerException appears twice), identifies root causes with high confidence, generates ranked fix suggestions with implementation steps, creates alert definitions with severity levels, and produces comprehensive markdown report with executive summary and next steps.
phase_coverage: Phase 2: Extract and Normalize Stack Traces

test_cases.name: happy_path_syslog_format
test_cases.scenario: Analyze syslog-formatted error logs without stack traces to identify root causes using error messages and domain heuristics.

input.error_logs:
Jan 15 10:30:00 app-server error[5234]: Connection pool exhausted: 0 available connections
Jan 15 10:31:00 app-server error[5235]: Connection pool exhausted: 0 available connections
Jan 15 10:32:00 app-server error[5236]: Connection pool exhausted: 0 available connections

test_cases.expected_behavior: Skill parses syslog format, identifies connection pool exhaustion pattern, clusters three identical errors, infers Resource Exhaustion root cause with medium-high confidence, suggests database connection pool tuning fix, creates warning-level alert with frequency threshold, and generates report noting absence of stack traces.

test_cases.name: edge_case_single_error_below_frequency
test_cases.scenario: Process logs containing only one error occurrence when min_error_frequency is set to 2, testing filtering behavior.
test_cases.expected_behavior: Skill parses single error, recognizes it does not meet min_error_frequency threshold of 2, excludes it from clustering, reports zero clusters identified, flags insufficient data for pattern detection, and recommends manual investigation or additional data collection.

test_cases.name: edge_case_empty_log_input
test_cases.scenario: Attempt to analyze empty or null error_logs input to test error handling and graceful failure.
test_cases.expected_behavior: Skill detects empty error_logs input in Phase 1, aborts execution with clear error message, returns error code indicating input validation failure, suggests user verify log file path and content, and does not attempt downstream analysis.

test_cases.name: edge_case_malformed_json_partial_parse
test_cases.scenario: Process logs with mixed valid and malformed JSON entries to test partial data handling and malformed entry tracking.
test_cases.expected_behavior: Skill parses JSON logs, identifies 1 malformed entry and 2 valid entries (66.7% success rate below 80% threshold), flags output as partial_data, continues analysis with valid entries, clusters two ValueError errors, and reports malformed entry count in metadata.

test_cases.name: quality_gate_clustering_threshold_adjustment
test_cases.scenario: Process logs that produce >100 clusters to test automatic threshold adjustment mechanism.

input.error_logs: [{"timestamp":"2024-01-15T10:30:00Z","severity":"ERROR","error_type":"Error_Type_A","message":"Unique error message 1","service":"service_1","environment":"prod"},{"timestamp":"2024-01-15T10:31:00Z","severity":"ERROR","error_type":"Error_Type_B","message":"Unique error message 2","service":"service_2","environment":"prod"},{"timestamp":"2024-01-15T10:32:00Z","severity":"ERROR","error_type":"Error_Type_C","message":"Unique error message 3","service":"service_3","environment":"prod"},{"timestamp":"2024-01-15T10:33:00Z","severity":"ERROR","error_type":"Error_Type_D","message":"Unique error message 4","service":"service_4","environment":"prod"},{"timestamp":"2024-01-15T10:34:00Z","severity":"ERROR","error_type":"Error_Type_E","message":"Unique error message 5","service":"service_5","environment":"prod"}]

test_cases.expected_behavior: Skill detects that low clustering threshold (0.5) with diverse errors would produce >100 clusters, automatically increases threshold by 0.05 increments until clusters <= 100, documents all adjustments in clustering_metadata, and reports final threshold used in output.

test_cases.name: error_handling_unrecognized_log_format
test_cases.scenario: Provide logs in unrecognized format to test format detection fallback and partial parsing.

input.error_logs:
ERROR: Something went wrong at 2024-01-15 10:30:00
WARNING: Another issue at 2024-01-15 10:31:00
ERROR: Third problem at 2024-01-15 10:32:00

test_cases.expected_behavior: Skill detects unrecognized log format, attempts generic plain-text line-by-line parsing, flags entries that could not be fully structured, continues analysis with partial data, notes format detection result in output, and reports parsing confidence level.

test_cases.name: error_handling_no_stack_traces_available
test_cases.scenario: Analyze logs with error messages but no stack traces to test Phase 2 adjustment and reduced precision handling.

input.error_logs: [{"timestamp":"2024-01-15T10:30:00Z","severity":"ERROR","error_type":"DatabaseError","message":"Connection refused to database server","service":"data-service","environment":"prod"},{"timestamp":"2024-01-15T10:31:00Z","severity":"ERROR","error_type":"DatabaseError","message":"Connection refused to database server","service":"data-service","environment":"prod"}]

test_cases.expected_behavior: Skill identifies absence of stack traces in Phase 2, adjusts to use error messages and error types for clustering, continues analysis with reduced precision, marks confidence levels as medium rather than high, and notes in report that stack trace data was unavailable.
phase_coverage: Phase 2: Extract and Normalize Stack Traces

test_cases.name: quality_gate_low_confidence_root_causes
test_cases.scenario: Analyze logs with ambiguous error patterns to test low confidence flagging and manual review requirement.
test_cases.expected_behavior: Skill analyzes ambiguous errors with vague messages and no stack traces, assigns low confidence (<0.6) to inferred root causes, flags root causes as requiring_manual_review=true, includes all available evidence, and reports overall confidence_assessment as 'low' in metadata.

test_cases.name: happy_path_with_known_issues_matching
test_cases.scenario: Analyze logs that match previously known issues to test known_issues cross-reference and resolution verification.

input.error_logs: [{"timestamp":"2024-01-15T10:30:00Z","severity":"ERROR","error_type":"NullPointerException","message":"Cannot read property 'config' of undefined","stack_trace":"at loadConfig (config-loader.js:23)\nat initialize (app.js:45)","service":"app-service","environment":"prod","version":"2.0.5"},{"timestamp":"2024-01-15T10:31:00Z","severity":"ERROR","error_type":"NullPointerException","message":"Cannot read property 'config' of undefined","stack_trace":"at loadConfig (config-loader.js:23)\nat initialize (app.js:45)","service":"app-service","environment":"prod","version":"2.0.5"}]

known_issues.error_signature: NullPointerException: Cannot read property 'config' of undefined
known_issues.root_cause: Missing environment variable CONFIG_PATH in production deployment
known_issues.fix_applied: Added default config path fallback in config-loader.js

test_cases.expected_behavior: Skill identifies error cluster matching known_issues entry, cross-references with high signature similarity, marks matched_known_issue=true and resolution_verified=true, sets likelihood_of_resolution=1.0 for matched fix, includes note 'Fix verified in production', and reports matched_known_issues_count in metadata.
phase_coverage: Phase 2: Extract and Normalize Stack Traces
